# Preetham Kyanam

> Software engineer based in Ashburn, Virginia. B.S. Computer Engineering from Virginia Tech (2023). Full stack developer, AI agent builder, and open-source contributor. AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner and AI Practitioner.

## Docs

- [Preetham Kyanam](https://preetham.org/index.md): Software engineer building full stack applications, AI agents, and developer tools
- [About](https://preetham.org/about.md): A bit more about me
- [Work Experience](https://preetham.org/experience/work.md): Professional experience and entrepreneurship
- [Education](https://preetham.org/experience/education.md): Academic background and certifications
- [Skills](https://preetham.org/experience/skills.md): Languages, frameworks, and tools I work with
- [AgentMeld](https://preetham.org/projects/agentmeld.md): Asynchronous cloud agents alongside local coding agents
- [ArduRoomba](https://preetham.org/projects/arduroomba.md): Arduino library for controlling iRobot Roomba
- [cli-pk](https://preetham.org/projects/cli-pk.md): AI-powered coding assistant CLI
- [claude-ps5-mcp](https://preetham.org/projects/claude-ps5-mcp.md): MCP server for PS5 discovery and Wake-on-LAN
- [OpenHome Abilities](https://preetham.org/projects/openhome-abilities.md): Voice AI abilities for the OpenHome smart speaker platform
- [gba-next](https://preetham.org/projects/gba-next.md): GBA emulator inside Next.js
- [gh-contributions-menu-bar](https://preetham.org/projects/gh-contributions-menu-bar.md): macOS menu bar app for GitHub contributions
- [rustyclaw](https://preetham.org/projects/rustyclaw.md): OpenClaw alternative in Rust
- [GPTmon](https://preetham.org/projects/gptmon.md): AI-generated Pokemon clone
- [Projects](https://preetham.org/projects/index.md): Open-source projects and services I've built
- [Contact](https://preetham.org/contact.md): Get in touch
